components.name: StatusBadge
components.description: Displays a job lifecycle status with colour-coded pill.

components.name: SyncBadge
components.description: Shows pending / error sync state. Renders nothing when synced.

components.name: PriorityIndicator
components.description: Dot + text priority chip.

components.name: JobCard
components.description: Horizontally swipeable job summary card. Left-swipe reveals Maps + Call; right-swipe starts timer.

components.name: TimerPanel
components.description: Live work-timer with start/pause/stop controls. Writes TimeEntry records.

components.name: EvidenceCapture
components.description: Full capture flow: camera → metadata → upload queue. Handles camera-denied fallback (file picker).

props.name: onCaptured
props.description: () => void — called after evidence record created

components.name: EvidenceTile
components.description: Thumbnail tile with QC badge overlay. Tappable.

components.name: QcBadge
components.description: Reusable QC state badge, importable independently.

components.name: EvidenceScroller
components.description: Horizontal thumbnail strip for a job. Includes Add button.

components.name: DailyTimeline
components.description: Visual vertical timeline with drag-to-resize segment handles (44px touch targets). Emits TimeEntry updates with client_event_id.
components.notes: Exports buildSegments(entries) helper to derive typed segments for other consumers.

components.name: RunbookView
components.description: Phase-gated step list sourced from job.runbook_phases. Enforces sequential completion.

components.name: ChatView
components.description: Job-scoped real-time message thread. Polls every 10s. Supports image attachments.

components.name: QuickActionsBar
components.description: Row of contextual action buttons (Photo, Attach, Note, Safety, More). Each opens a bottom sheet.

components.name: SyncIndicator
components.description: Compact top-bar sync status pill. Auto-hides when fully synced.

components.name: OfflineBanner
components.description: Full-width amber offline warning shown when navigator.onLine is false.

props.name: pendingCount
props.description: Number of queued items pending sync

components.name: BlockerForm
components.description: Form to create a Blocker entity with type, severity, notes, and optional evidence.

components.name: CheckInFlow
components.description: GPS check-in with distance guard and manual fallback.

components.name: AdminShell
components.description: Dark sidebar layout shell for admin console pages. Handles mobile hamburger.

components.name: DiagnosticsModal
components.description: Full-screen diagnostic overlay: device info, network telemetry, HTTP error log (intercepted via fetch patch), log export.

components.name: QueuedItemsViewer
components.description: Dashboard table of pending/failed SyncQueue items with per-item retry/cancel and bulk Retry All.

props.name: jobs
props.description: Used to resolve job title from job_id

Job.description: Work order assigned to a technician

Evidence.description: A captured media item (photo, video, signature, attachment) linked to a job

TimeEntry.description: A single timestamped clock event for a job

Blocker.description: An impediment reported during job execution

ChatMessage.description: A message in the per-job thread

SyncQueue.description: Offline operation queue — also used for snapshots, device registrations
